physical.athletics: Increases performance in climbing, jumping, and sustained movement.
physical.dodge: Improves evasion from melee and ranged attacks.
physical.parry: Enables deflection of melee attacks with weapons.
physical.riposte: Allows counterattacks after a successful parry.
physical.block: Raises passive defense when using weapons or fists.
physical.dual_wield: Allows use of two one-handed weapons simultaneously.
physical.double_attack: Grants chance to strike twice in a single action.
physical.triple_attack: Grants chance to strike three times in a single action.
physical.bash: Stuns the enemy with a shield or blunt weapon.
physical.shield_defense: Improves blocking and damage reduction when wielding a shield.
physical.taunt: Increases likelihood of drawing enemy attention.
physical.backstab: Delivers high damage from behind using piercing weapons.
physical.1h_blunt: Increases proficiency with one-handed blunt weapons.
physical.1h_piercing: Increases proficiency with one-handed piercing weapons.
physical.1h_slashing: Increases proficiency with one-handed slashing weapons.
physical.2h_blunt: Increases proficiency with two-handed blunt weapons.
physical.2h_piercing: Increases proficiency with two-handed piercing weapons.
physical.2h_slashing: Increases proficiency with two-handed slashing weapons.
physical.weapon_mastery: General skill improving melee weapon damage and accuracy.
physical.archery: Boosts effectiveness with bows and arrows.
physical.leopard_stike: Attacks the enemy and has a chance to stun.
physical.throwing: Improves accuracy and range when throwing weapons.

magic.conjuration: Focuses on summoning creatures or items.
magic.divination: Reveals hidden information or detects magic.
magic.enchantment: Manipulates emotions or imbues magical effects.
magic.necromancy: Manipulates life and death, raising the dead.
magic.transmutation: Alters the properties of creatures or objects.
magic.wild_magic: Adds random and chaotic effects to spellcasting.
magic.alteration: Modifies physical aspects such as movement or weight.
magic.concentration: Improves casting stability when under pressure.
magic.channeling: Helps direct magical energy without interruption.
magic.meditation: Passively restores mana faster during rest.
magic.spell_casting: General skill improving overall casting success.

crafting.alchemy: Creates potions and magical brews from ingredients.
crafting.blacksmithing: Crafts weapons, armor, and metal tools.
crafting.brewing: Makes drinks and simple potions using organic ingredients.
crafting.cooking: Prepares food to restore health and apply buffs.
crafting.fletching: Crafts arrows, bows, and ranged implements.
crafting.fishing: Retrieves fish and aquatic resources from water.
crafting.forage: Gathers herbs, roots, and natural ingredients from terrain.
